items.title: Sony’s first RGB TV is a statement piece
items.summary: The first wave of RGB LED TVs are fighting for their spot in the TV hierarchy. items.title: DataGrail report finds your vendor may be sending data to AI models you never approved

items.summary: Spotify has launched a feature called Podcast Clips that lets listeners select, trim, and share specific moments from podcast episodes.
